rationale: All brief elements are present and correct: 'Dr. Maya Chen' bold white, 'Climate Scientist, NOAA' in muted gray, a teal #00C2A8 vertical accent bar, positioned lower-left near x=120 with baseline around y=940. Stills match the choreography — empty at 0%, fully visible at 25/50/75%, empty again at 100% — and the filmstrip shows the accent bar entering alone before the text, confirming the staggered lead-in. The only caveat is the exit: the final filmstrip tile (~4.75s) still reads near full opacity, suggesting the fade-out resolves quite late/sharply rather than easing across the 4.2-5.0s window. Typography is tight and hierarchical with clean contrast on the dark background; it reads as a genuine broadcast lower third I would ship.
